title: OpenCorporates connector configuration
description: Searches the OpenCorporates v0.4 companies API and imports companies as FtM Company entities anchored on opencorporates_id.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: OpenCorporates API token (a secret; UI password field, vault-encrypted at rest).

q.title: Search term
q.description: Company search query passed to the OpenCorporates companies search.

per_page.title: Results per page
per_page.description: Companies per page (OpenCorporates caps this at 100).

max_pages.title: Maximum pages
max_pages.description: Hard cap on the number of pages fetched per run (bounds the import).
